scripts.dev: npm run build -w shared && concurrently -n shared,server,client -c blue,green,magenta "npm:dev -w shared" "npm:dev -w server" "npm:dev -w client"
scripts.build: npm run build -w shared && npm run build -w server && npm run build -w client
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w shared && npm run typecheck -w server && npm run typecheck -w client
